recommendations.name: Stijn Ameloot
recommendations.title: Software Engineer
recommendations.text: I had the pleasure of working closely with Ninad for over a year and a half, and he was a great addition to our team. From the start, Ninad stood out for both his talent and his genuine passion for UI/UX. He is very skilled at creating prototypes and modern, intuitive product designs. He has a sharp eye for detail and, perhaps most importantly, is a proactive listener who truly values feedback. Beyond his professional capabilities, Ninad is a kind person who was a pleasure to work with. He has a positive attitude and was a very easy-going colleague to have in the office. I would recommend Ninad to any company in search of a talented UI/UX designer. He would be a great asset to any team.

recommendations.name: Steven Gabriëls
recommendations.title: PO
recommendations.text: I had the pleasure of working with Ninad during my role as Product Owner at ZF. Ninad is very versatile UI/UX developer who delivers solid work on both mobile as web. Always focused on guiding the user in successfully achieving the task at hand. I was pleasantly surprised by the speed in which Ninad creates prototypes. He usually presents potential variants aimed to optimize the user flow or providing more clarity. Ninad also goes beyond visuals, he helps to discover the user flow, asks the right questions, runs workshops, verifies the actual implementation and does user behavior studies. He is also very collaborative, easy and fun to work with. I'd recommend Ninad for any team looking for a skilled and reliable UX/UI designer.

recommendations.name: Marco Vega
recommendations.title: Fintech Founder
recommendations.text: I decided to work with Ninad very early with our company. We needed someone who could help figure out our brand identity and UX/UI design our website. He ran a number of workshops with us to figure this out. We gradually arrived at something the entire team was excited about, and our customers absolutely love! Since then he has worked on a number of our websites and applications, and he never disappoints! He puts so much thought into his work, and I have ZERO hesitations in recommending his work to others. You will not be disappointed. He also has a great grasp of the full process of project development, and he's a very easy person to work with, so you will be in safe hands. 10/10!
